title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tripura Sundari attempts to dissuade Lord Shiva from engaging in combat with Tarakasura's sons, but Goddess Parvati intervenes. As Lord Shiva finds himself surrounded by Asuras, Goddess Parvati and Tripura Sundari confront each other.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura, consumed by worry for his sons, resolves to confront Lord Shiva in a desperate attempt to save them. However, Lord Shiva, wielding his divine powers, takes action by launching Tarakasura's sons into space and arranging them as targets.

title: Jaganmathe
subTitle: Sakthi is blessed with powers from the Goddess JAGANMATHE. Adored by the villagers for her abilities, she has grown up under the strict watch of her sister, who is her total opposite. Her life takes a turn when she meets an atheist doctor.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan informs his mother about the divorce and the reason why he did not reveal the truth to Janaki. While his mother advises him to disclose the truth, Niranjan is hesitant.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan and Prabhanjan's father heaps praise on Chandu Bargi for everything he has done for the family. On the other hand, Chandu donates funds to Shankar Devagatta's school for the betterment of education.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan's father suggests him to pay off Chandu's debt before disclosing the truth about him to Janaki. On the other hand Niranjan's mother offers to sell their house to help him pay off the debt. Will Niranjan be willing to sell his house?

title: Prem Adda

subTitle: Gangadhar pursues Moti Bai, inviting her to his dance school. Meanwhile, an injured Manu triumphs over George. Patriotic villagers block George's escape attempt.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Sheela Bhushan meets her mentor CSP and shares her happiness of meeting him after a long time. While recollecting old memories, she expresses regret for being the opposing lawyer in the Varun Vaibhav case.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki meets Mythri Mahananda and notices her worried look. When Janaki enquires her about it, Mythri confesses to finding her childhood photograph in an ashram requests Janaki's help in finding her biological parents.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srihari accidentally spills oil on the floor, causing Charu to slip and fracture her leg. However, Charu accuses Srihari of deliberately causing her injury.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: A heartbroken Srihari resolves to remain single for his entire life. However, Srimathi decides to change his mind and sets him up with Soumya.

subTitle: Gangadhar pursues Moti Bai, inviting her to his dance school. Meanwhile, an injured Manu triumphs over George. Patriotic villagers block George's escape attempt.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Mythri's happiness is short-lived when Chandramurthy introduces his daughter Dhatri who went missing in the fair.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While on their way back to home, Janaki notices a fortune-teller and recommends Mythri to seek his guidance as his prophecy has come true for her. Taking Janaki's advise, Mythri asks him about her parents, to which he makes a mysterious prophecy.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva quells the cruelty of Tarakasura's sons, ending their lives with his powerful Pashupatastra. However, another Asura, unable to bear this defeat, launches an attack on Lord Shiva in retaliation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Karthikeya discovers the truth about his lineage through Guruji. Meanwhile, Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati invite their son to join them in Kailash. Will he agree to go with them?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya's steadfast devotion impresses Lord Shiva, who, feeling content, encourages Kartikeya to seek a boon. Seizing the moment, Kartikeya asks for the truth about his parents.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya is stunned to discover that his father is none other than Lord Shiva himself. Overwhelmed, Kartikeya breaks down, feeling hurt for not being acknowledged as the son of Goddess Parvati and Lord Shiva.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva and Goddess Parvati feel saddened as they bid farewell to Kartikeya, who shows no willingness to understand the situation. When will Kartikeya realize that his parents have been protecting him all along?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya, feeling let down, makes a vow to remain with his guardians and never venture towards Kailash to see his parents. Will he stick to his resolution?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons, upon lifting the curse and reviving him, learn from Bhandasura the whereabouts of Kartikeya. Will they find Kartikeya in the said location?

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Kartikeya's whereabouts are discovered by Tarakasura prompting him to make a drastic decision to end his own life. In response, Lord Shiva vows to fulfill his promise of protecting Kartikeya from danger, preparing to take fierce actions to safeguard.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Tarakasura's sons plead with Tripura Sundari to protect them from Lord Shiva. Parvati and Shiva face off in the battle of Karma. Who will win?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Upon learning of Niranjan's decision to divorce Janaki, an irate Chandu orders Niranjan to tear the divorce papers. But Niranjan disobeys the order and refuses to reconsider his decision. How will Chandu react to Niranjan's defiance?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While being questioned by Janaki, Niranjan informs her that he lied under pressure and he will soon disclose the truth. Having learnt about Niranjan's move, Chandu grows worried and warns Niranjan. What will Niranjan plan to do now?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Shankar Devagatta decides not to accept the Home Minister ticket and gives it up. Soon, Chandu Bargi is felicitated for being the leading candidate in the upcoming elections. Did Chandu win the election ticket through illegal means?

title: Randhawa
subTitle: A photographer named Robert travels to a remote village to investigate strange recurring dreams he has been having. Soon, he discovers a link between himself and a legendary king.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: At Mythri's request, Janaki accompanies Mythri to search for her biological parents. During their investigation, a resident of the locality claims to know the person the duo is looking for and points them towards an address.

subTitle: Upon learning that Mythri went missing in a fair, Janaki grows suspicious and informs her that even Shyamala's daughter had a similar case of missing.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Srimathi declines Pandu's request to relocate to Chennai for his promotion. However, Pandu resolves to persuade Srimathi.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Upon learning of a professional wrestling match with a substantial prize, Srimati informs the family. Consequently, Pandu and Punda decide to enter the competition.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Chaaru boldly denounces a Swamiji as fraudulent. However, chaos erupts when the enraged Swamiji retaliates by placing a curse on her.

title: Papa Pandu
subTitle: Nimmi frightens away two thieves by posing as a secret agent. However, her deception backfires, causing trouble for the Pandu family.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Madhukar proudly hands over a cheque of ten lakhs to CSP in the hopes that he will be showered with praises. However, CSP gets suspicious when Madhukar claims that he drew the money from his savings.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Noticing Madhukar looking concerned while waiting for her, Sheela talks to him over a cup of coffee.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Shiva attempts to persuade Karthikeya to join the mission to defeat Tarakasura. However, Karthikeya decides to stay with his mother and declines Lord Shiva's invitation.

title: Shiva Shakthi
subTitle: Lord Brahma expresses concern when Karthikeya refuses to defeat Tarakasura. However, Lord Shiva devises a clever strategy to persuade Karthikeya to reconsider his decision.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Kartikeya suggests Parvati and Shankar to give an invitation card to all the Gods for Ganpati's Vrat Bandhan ceremony. Parvati, Shankar and all the other Gods like the new idea of invitation cards.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Rejected by Mahadeva and Vishnu, Lord Brahma seeks aid from Chandradev. However, Chandradev's denial provokes Brahma's curse.

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Narad is cursed by his father Brahmadev for not favouring his orders. Unable to tolerate Brahmadev's nature, Chandradev goes in search of Ganesha. Can Batukh calm Brahmadev down?

title: Deva Sri Ganesha
subTitle: Indradev is offended when he finds Nalakubher sleeping during his lectures in the Gurukul. Meanwhile, Batuk Maharaj is bored of sitting idle and asks Parvati and Nandi to play with him.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As Chanchala returns from London, Rashmi asks her to convince Janaki not to divorce Niranjan. On the other hand, Chandu meets the Chief Minister to discuss his ministership in the cabinet. Will Chandu receive good news from the Chief Minister?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Niranjan informs Janaki that he was blackmailed by a person to marry her to clear off his debt. He vows to reveal his name at the family dinner. Having learnt about Niranjan's plan from Janaki, what does Chandu plan to do to save himself?

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: While Chandu has made arrangements to trap Niranjan before he speaks out the truth, things turn out to be different. Will Niranjan get away from Chandu's plan? Will he reveal the truth to the family?

title: March 22
subTitle: The villagers from Rayadurga live a peaceful life, like a close-knit family. However, a prolonged famine and the arrival of a geologist lead to disharmony and chaos in their lives.

title: Madamakki
subTitle: Sadhu, a veteran of Mumbai's underworld, decides to go into hiding after his boss is gunned down. However, before he leaves, he makes one last trip to go see his mother in Madamakki.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: As the hearing continues in the court, CSP argues that Varun Vaibhav should undergo a DNA test to ascertain that he is Inchara's father. However, Sheela Bhushan makes a compelling argument against it.

title: Magalu Janaki
subTitle: Janaki is shocked when Madhukar informs her about Varun Vaibhav's fat cheque and the ill intention behind it. However, he also reveals that Sheela Bhushan suggested that he use that money to help the people in need.
